title: クレーンゲームに挑戦！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while out with Nice Nature...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I just saw the new prizes in that claw machine over
there.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature points toward a claw machine filled
with Umamusume plushies.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I saw the same one at a store in the shopping
district the other day. I was pretty impressed with
how popular they are.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
It just caught my attention, is all. I'm not the type
to like cutesy things, anyway.
choice_data_list: I'm going to go win one.
I'm going to go win one.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You want one that badly? You have interesting
taste.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Well, I'll be here watching. Good luck!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail now!
